headline: TE Connectivity (TEL) Gets Downgraded by Evercore ISI – Here’s Why
summary: TE Connectivity plc (NYSE:TEL) is one of the most promising future stocks to buy right now. TE Connectivity plc (NYSE:TEL) was downgraded by Evercore ISI to In Line from Outperform on June 22, with the firm bringing the price target on the stock down to $230 from $260. It told investors in a research note […]

headline: TE Connectivity (TEL) Lands In Bell Global Fund For EV And AI Exposure
summary: Bell Global Equities Fund has added TE Connectivity (NYSE:TEL) to its portfolio. The fund highlighted TE Connectivity's role in electric vehicle and AI data center components. The move reflects institutional attention on the company's exposure to fast-growing technology end markets. TE Connectivity focuses on connectors and sensors that sit inside many electric vehicles and AI data centers, linking power and data across complex systems. As more automakers scale up EV platforms and as AI...

headline: TE Connectivity to report third quarter financial results on July 22, 2026
summary: TE Connectivity plc (NYSE: TEL) will report financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2026 before trading begins on July 22, 2026. The company will hold a conference call for investors at 8:30 a.m. ET. The conference call may be accessed in the following ways:

headline: Jim Cramer: TE Connectivity Is ‘Terrific,’ Buy This Industrial Stock
summary: Jim Cramer recommended buying GE Vernova Inc. as Bernstein analyst initiated coverage with an Outperform rating and $1,206 price target.
